items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
As each day passes, Tarris Reed Jr. becomes more popular with his teammates.

"I think everybody loves him," fellow rookie Ja'Kobi Gillespie said.

Indeed, if the Summer #Spurs had to vote on a team captain, the first-round center might win in a landslide.

items.title: Carter Bryant will play sparingly at Summer League. Jayden Quaintance won't play at all. Tarris Reed Jr. is ready to flash his blue-collar credentials in a Spurs jersey.
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
Carter Bryant will play sparingly at Summer League. Jayden Quaintance won't play at all. Tarris Reed Jr. is ready to flash his blue-collar credentials in a Spurs jersey.

Those storylines and more to watch as the Spurs open Summer League today in San Francisco:

items.body_excerpt:
Tarris Reed Jr. when asked about having a veteran of the 2026 NBA Finals on hand to help show him and other #Spurs rookies the ropes at Summer League.

"How old is he? Twenty? He's a young cat. It's crazy," Reed, 22,  said of Carter Bryant, 20.

items.title: Tarris Reed Jr. called losing the national title “probably the toughest moment of my life” and that both he and his new teammates will have chips on their shoulders next season. “I feel like that's going to be huge for us next year,” he said.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt: Tarris Reed Jr. called losing the national title “probably the toughest moment of my life” and that both he and his new teammates will have chips on their shoulders next season. “I feel like that's going to be huge for us next year,” he said.

items.title: Sources: The San Antonio Spurs will select Trevon Brazile with the No. 35 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Brazile is going to the Denver Nuggets as part of the Tarris Reed Jr. (No. 26 pick) trade.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The San Antonio Spurs will select Trevon Brazile with the No. 35 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Brazile is going to the Denver Nuggets as part of the Tarris Reed Jr. (No. 26 pick) trade.
